help.body.text: Chat • Just send a message and the bot will answer • /new new chat (clears history) • /reset clears conversation history Memory • /remember <text> saves a note • /memory shows your notes • /forget <id> deletes a note Bookmarks • /save (as reply) bookmarks a bot response • /bookmarks shows saved bookmarks Multi-AI • /debate <question> asks multiple AIs in parallel Configuration • /settings visual settings menu • /setmodel <model> changes AI model (opus, sonnet, haiku) • /resetmodel resets model to default • /models shows current slot assignments • /setlimit <profile> changes profile (light, normal, power, unlimited) • /usage shows usage and profile Setup & Language • /start welcome (setup wizard for new users) • /onboarding start setup wizard manually • /lang <code> change language (de, en, fr, ...) Help • /help this overview

remember.usage.text:
Usage:
/remember <text>  save text
/remember <label>  (as reply)  save bot response with label

forget.success.text:
Forgotten: {entry_id}

Note: If the content is in the current conversation, use /reset for a full restart.

forget.not_found.text: Entry '{entry_id}' not found or does not belong to you.

memory.empty.text: No memories saved yet. Use /remember <text> to save something.

bookmark.save_hint.text: Reply to a bot message with /save to bookmark it.

bookmark.list_empty.text: You have no bookmarks yet. Reply to a bot message with /save to bookmark it.

inline_command.warning.text: Note: Commands like /setmodel or /reset must be sent as a separate message, not combined with text.

settings.reset_all_nothing.text: No overrides active, nothing to do.

setmodel.set_success_note.text: Takes effect from your next message.

setmodel.reset_nothing.text: No model override active. You are already using the default ({default_model}).

setmodel.usage_hint.text:
Usage:
  /setmodel <model> (global)
  /setmodel <slot> <model> (per slot)
  /setmodel reset (reset all)
  /setmodel reset <slot> (reset slot)

Slots: {slots}
Example: /setmodel code opus

debate.single_provider_hint.text: 💡 Only 1 provider available. For a real Multi-AI Debate: configure more providers (e.g. install Ollama).

debate.usage.text:
Use /debate <question> to query multiple AIs in parallel.

Example: /debate What is Bitcoin?

onboarding.step2.text:
You're all set! 🚀

Language: {lang_name}

Good to know:
• Your language isn't locked, you can change it anytime via /settings
• Use /help to see all commands
• Just ask me a question and let's go

onboarding.hint.text: Tip: Use /onboarding to complete the setup.

start.welcome.text:
Axolent is ready.

Send me a question and I'll answer it.

Tip: You can bookmark bot messages. Just reply with /save.

error.generic.text: The language model provider reports a problem (ref: {error_id}). Please try again shortly.

usage.profile_unlimited.text:
Profile: Unlimited

🔓 No limits active.

Change profile: /setlimit normal

rate_limit.unlimited_reminder.text:
🔓 Note: You are in unlimited mode. No limits active.
If you want more structure: /setlimit normal

rate_limit.options_light.text:
You can change your limit anytime for free:
• /usage — current overview
• /setlimit normal — more headroom (350/h, 1,500/day)
• /setlimit power — much more (900/h, 10,000/day)

rate_limit.options_normal.text:
You can change your limit anytime for free:
• /usage — current overview
• /setlimit power — much more headroom (900/h, 10,000/day)

rate_limit.options_power.text:
• /usage — current overview
• /setlimit unlimited — disable all limits

rate_limit.upgrade_light.text: Want to do more? /setlimit normal raises the limit to 350/h.

rate_limit.upgrade_normal.text: Want to do more? /setlimit power raises the limit to 900/h.

usage.body.text:
Profile: {profile}

This minute: {min_used}/{min_limit} {min_bar} (Reset in {min_reset})
This hour: {hour_used}/{hour_limit} {hour_bar} (Reset in {hour_reset})
Today: {day_used}/{day_limit} {day_bar} (Reset at {day_reset})

Change profile: /setlimit <light|normal|power|unlimited>

setlimit.confirm_unlimited.text:
⚠️ You want to disable all limits.

Risk:
• Telegram may temporarily block the bot with too many edits
• Your subscription will be used up faster
• You will get a reminder every 100 requests

If you are sure: /setlimit unlimited confirm

setlimit.changed_unlimited.text:
🔓 Profile changed: {old} → Unlimited

No limits active. Reminder every 100 requests.
Revert: /setlimit normal

errors.not_authorized.text: You are not authorized to use this bot.

debate.rate_limit_short.text: You have reached your limit. Wait a moment or increase your profile with /setlimit.

debate.querying.text: Querying AIs in parallel... may take 30-60 seconds.

debate.only_one_provider.text: Only one provider responded. No comparison possible.

debate.consensus_high.text: The providers largely agree on content (word overlap: {overlap}). High agreement on core statements.

debate.consensus_partial.text: The providers show partial agreement (word overlap: {overlap}). Core statements similar, but different emphasis.

debate.consensus_low.text: The providers give significantly different responses (word overlap: {overlap}). Compare the responses above for different perspectives.

fallback.notice.text: Note: primary model unavailable, response from {backup}.

fallback.all_failed.text: Sorry, no AI provider is available right now. Please try again later.

fallback.rate_limited.text: Rate limit reached. Trying backup model...

self_awareness.text_precise.text: Answer precisely with these values when asked about slot occupancy.

self_awareness.text_self_id.text: When the user asks which model you are using, answer with these values. Do not speculate from training data.

self_awareness.text_no_slots.text: If asked about other slots and you do not have this slot list, answer honestly: 'I only have information about my active slot.' Do not speculate.

time_context.unusual_hours.text: Note: User is active outside their normal hours. Consider a gentle acknowledgment if appropriate.

time_context.capability.text: You HAVE access to the current local time and date shown above. When the user asks about time or date, answer with these values. NEVER claim you have no access to current time or real-time data.

style.no_repetition_rule.text: Avoid word repetitions, especially repeated sentence starters and filler words like Sure, Certainly, Of course, Absolutely. Vary your expressions or omit filler words entirely. Do NOT start responses with Sure or similar pleasantries.

settings.debate.help_multi.text: Select one or more providers for /debate

settings.toast_provider_planned.text: This provider is coming in Phase 1

skill.detail_usage.text:
Please provide a skill name or ID.
Example: /skill Drehkonzepte

skill.not_found_query.text:
No skill found for '{query}'.
Use /skills for an overview.

skill.forget_prompt.text: Which skill would you like to forget?

skill.forgotten_permanent.text:
Skill '{name}' permanently forgotten.
This pattern will never be learned again.

skill.forgotten_tombstone.text:
Skill '{name}' forgotten (30-day tombstone).
After 30 days, the pattern can be learned again.

skill.learn_usage.text:
Please describe the skill or reply to a bot message.
Example: /learn Always use bullet points in summaries

skill.learn_empty.text: Empty skill text. Please describe what I should remember.

skill.learn_secret_blocked.text:
This skill cannot be saved: may contain {secret_type}.
Skills must not contain passwords, API keys, prices, or personal data.

skill.learn_max_reached.text:
You already have 50 active skills.
Use /forget to make room, or /skills for an overview.

skill.learn_privacy_blocked.text:
This skill cannot be saved: blocked by privacy filter.
Reason: {reason}

skill.learn_saved.text:
Skill saved: '{name}'
Status: Confirmed (will be applied when matching).
This skill is decay-immune and remains until you forget it.

skill.explain_name_required.text:
Please provide a skill name.
Example: /explain Drehkonzepte

skill.paused.text:
Skill '{name}' paused.
Will no longer be applied, but remains saved.

skill.resumed.text:
Skill '{name}' active again (confirmed).
Will be applied with confirmation when matching.

skill.undo_done.text:
Skill application '{name}' undone.
Contradiction has been noted.

skill.import_usage.text:
Please provide a folder path.
Example: /import ~/Documents/ChatGPT-Export/

skill.import_no_files.text:
No importable files found.
Supported formats: .md, .json, .jsonl, .txt

skill.import_preview_header.text: The following files will be analyzed locally:

skill.import_privacy_note.text: Content will NOT be modified or uploaded.

skill.import_suggested_note.text:
All imported patterns start as suggestions.
Use /skills to view them.

skill.profile_empty.text:
No skills learned yet.
Use the bot and it will automatically learn your preferences,
or save directly with /learn.

skill.profile_more.text:
... and {count} more skills.
Use /skill <name> for details.

skill.confirm_never.text: Skill paused. It will not be suggested again.

skill.confirm_expired.text: Confirmation expired. Please send your message again.

stop.confirmation.text: Stream stopped. Your conversation is preserved.
